[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11101001 5
1 00111101 5
2 01000000 1
3 11111011 7
4 01010001 3
5 10110101 5
6 10100110 4
7 11011101 6

01 10 11011111 7
12 21 11110011 6
23 32 11100111 6
34 43 01100110 4
45 54 01100111 5
56 65 11111011 7 match 3
67 76 11011101 6 match 7
70 07 11011111 7

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 01110110 5
24 42 11100101 5
35 53 01100111 5
46 64 11011101 6 match 7
57 75 11111111 a
60 06 11011111 7
71 17 11011110 6

47 74 11011100 5
50 05 10111111 7
61 16 11011011 6
72 27 11111101 7
